name: WBPSC – BWO, Revenue Inspector and More

basic_details.job_title: WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for BWO, Revenue Inspector and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) released Miscellaneous Services Recruitment Vacancies. The Online registration process starts on April 30, 2026, and ends on June 09, 2026. Interested applicants can submit their applications through the official website, psc.wb.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Download WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2024 Detailed Advertisement PDF
seo_tags: West Bengal Public Service Commission BWO
